CVE-2021-44228.summary: Apache Log4j2 JNDI features do not protect against attacker-controlled LDAP/JNDI lookups (Log4Shell), enabling remote code execution.

CVE-2017-0144.summary: SMBv1 remote code execution (EternalBlue) in Microsoft Windows; used by WannaCry and NotPetya.

CVE-2021-26855.summary: Microsoft Exchange Server SSRF (ProxyLogon) allowing authentication bypass and remote code execution.

CVE-2021-34527.summary: Windows Print Spooler remote code execution (PrintNightmare).

CVE-2020-1472.summary: Netlogon elevation of privilege (Zerologon) allowing domain-controller takeover.

CVE-2014-0160.summary: OpenSSL TLS heartbeat information disclosure (Heartbleed) leaking process memory.
